_note: Curated, index-only page descriptions merged into app-surface.generated.json by `npm run map:project`. These make pages findable via the findAppPage tool and PROJECT-MAP.md WITHOUT rendering anything in the UI (unlike PageShell's visible description prop). Add an entry here for any page that has no PageShell description. A page's own PageShell description always wins over this sidecar.

descriptions./: List all projects across the organization with filtering, search, and client/estimating/internal scope tabs
descriptions./[projectId]/billing-periods: Create and manage invoice billing periods with manual or automatic frequency setup
descriptions./[projectId]/budget: View and manage project budget with line items, modifications, forecasting, and cost tracking
descriptions./[projectId]/budget/setup: Create initial budget line items by selecting cost codes and entering amounts
descriptions./[projectId]/change-orders: List prime contract and commitment change orders with status and financial details
descriptions./[projectId]/change-orders/[changeOrderI: Redirect to change order detail page with edit mode enabled
descriptions./[projectId]/change-orders/new: Redirect legacy change order create URLs to canonical prime or commitment PCO routes
descriptions./[projectId]/client-dashboard: Client-facing project overview with contract, milestones, RFIs, and recent documents
descriptions./[projectId]/commitments: List subcontracts and purchase orders with financial totals and change order details
descriptions./[projectId]/commitments/[commitmentId]: View commitment details including SOV, change orders, invoices, and related documents
descriptions./[projectId]/commitments/[commitmentId]/: Edit subcontract or purchase order details including attachments and schedule of values
View subcontractor invoice details and payment information
Create a new pending change order (PCO) for a subcontract or purchase order
descriptions./[projectId]/commitments/new: Create new subcontract or purchase order with details and schedule of values
descriptions./[projectId]/commitments/recycle-bin: Redirect to commitments list filtered to recycle bin with soft-deleted records
descriptions./[projectId]/commitments/settings: Configure commitment settings for auto-numbering, defaults, and approval thresholds
descriptions./[projectId]/daily-log: List daily logs with weather, manpower, equipment, and site management notes
descriptions./[projectId]/daily-log/[dailyLogId]/edit: Edit daily log entry with weather conditions, manpower, equipment, and general notes
descriptions./[projectId]/daily-log/new: Create new daily log entry with site observations and project activities
descriptions./[projectId]/direct-costs: List direct costs with vendor, amounts, and status tracked separately from commitments
descriptions./[projectId]/directory: Manage project team members and companies with roles, contact info, and access control
descriptions./[projectId]/documents: Store and organize project documents with versioning, search, and metadata tracking
descriptions./[projectId]/documents/[documentId]: View and preview an individual document with details and content display
descriptions./[projectId]/drawings: Upload and manage project drawings and design documents with versioning
descriptions./[projectId]/emails: View project-related emails integrated from Outlook or other email systems
descriptions./[projectId]/estimates: List project estimates with dates and status for tracking bidding activities
descriptions./[projectId]/estimates/new: Redirect to estimates list page for creating new estimates
descriptions./[projectId]/home: Project command center dashboard with budget, team, alerts, and key performance metrics
descriptions./[projectId]/hub: Tabbed project hub for quick access to documents, emails, meetings, and modules
descriptions./[projectId]/intelligence: AI-powered project intelligence with insights, timeline, and source document references
descriptions./[projectId]/intelligence/sources/[sourc: View source document used by a project intelligence packet with full content context
descriptions./[projectId]/invoices: View owner and subcontractor invoices with billing periods organized by status
descriptions./[projectId]/invoices/owner/new: Redirect to canonical owner invoice creation page with contract context
descriptions./[projectId]/invoicing: Legacy redirect to canonical invoices workspace
descriptions./[projectId]/invoicing/new: Legacy redirect to canonical owner invoice creation with optional billing period
descriptions./[projectId]/invoicing/subcontractor: Legacy redirect to subcontractor invoices tab
descriptions./[projectId]/invoicing/subcontractor/[in: View detailed subcontractor invoice with schedule of values and change orders
descriptions./[projectId]/invoicing/subcontractor/new: Create new subcontractor invoice with SOV and approved change orders
descriptions./[projectId]/meetings: List project meetings with transcripts and extracted key information
descriptions./[projectId]/meetings/[meetingId]: View meeting transcript with segments, tasks, risks, decisions, and opportunities
descriptions./[projectId]/outlook-emails: Display emails imported from Outlook linked to the project
descriptions./[projectId]/pcos: List potential change orders by status with version, value, and schedule impact
descriptions./[projectId]/pcos/[pcoId]/edit: Edit potential change order with change events, line items, and markup
descriptions./[projectId]/pcos/new: Create new potential change order linked to change events with line items
descriptions./[projectId]/permissions: Legacy redirect to user management page
descriptions./[projectId]/prime-contract-pcos/[pcoId]: Edit prime contract potential change order metadata and status
descriptions./[projectId]/prime-contract-pcos/new: Create prime contract PCO from change events or standalone for conversion to CO
descriptions./[projectId]/prime-contracts: List prime contracts with financial totals, expandable change orders, and PCOs
descriptions./[projectId]/prime-contracts/[contractId: View prime contract PCO within the contract's change orders context
Edit prime contract PCO within change order context
Create new prime contract PCO linked to a specific prime contract
Redirect to contract detail page with edit mode enabled
Redirect to invoice creation with the prime contract pre-selected as context

descriptions./[projectId]/prime-contracts/new: Create new prime contract with standard fields or from a project estimate
descriptions./[projectId]/progress-reports: List weekly progress reports with photos, recipients, and publication status
descriptions./[projectId]/progress-reports/[reportId]: Edit and publish a weekly progress report from meetings, emails, and photos

descriptions./[projectId]/tasks: Project task inbox and workflow management interface
